title: Battle Royale
announce_missing: You need to provide an announcement.
announce_too_long: Announcement cannot be longer than %s characters.
join_player_only: Only players can join the battle royale.
join_already_in_match: You are already in the battle royale.
join_match_already_active: There is already an active battle royale.
join_match_full: The battle royale lobby is full.
join_no_loadouts: No battle royale loadouts have been configured.
leave_not_in_match: You are not in the battle royale.
match_cancelled_not_enough_players: Not enough players to start. Waiting for more players to join.
announce_no_active_match: There is no active battle royale.
announce_no_players: There are no battle royale players to announce to.
finish_no_active_match: There is no active battle royale to finish.
finish_no_players: There are no battle royale players to finish.
finish_last_player_standing: Last player standing! The battle royale is over.
